title: Teb Lokey
compiled_truth: Teb Lokey is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-06 to 2002-03-25), Teb Lokey sent 147 and received 746 emails, totalling 893 interactions. Top correspondents: [Robert Kilmer](people/robert-kilmer) (34), [Jeanette Doll](people/jeanette-doll) (21), [Blair Lichtenwalter](people/blair-lichtenwalter) (21), [Zelda Paschal](people/zelda-paschal) (14), [Bill Rapp](people/bill-rapp) (13). Mailbox folders observed: _sent_mail, deleted_items, inbox, sent_items.
